title: jelly mod
description: eat jelly by crafting it from jelly powder that can be made from slime balls!!, what are you waiting for? kill slimes and make a new use for the slime balls
body: As you kill slimes you get slime balls which can be be useless unless you wanna craft slime blocks, but now with this mod you can use the slime balls to craft jally powder and use the jelly powder to craft jelly annd eat it, which can also provide health boost
